\node[draw=black!25, rounded corners=2pt, fill=white, inner sep=5pt,
      anchor=north, font=\scriptsize] at
    ($(current bounding box.south)+(0,-0.5cm)$) {%
  \begin{tabular}{@{}lll@{}}
    \tikz[baseline=-1pt]\filldraw[fill=myblue,draw=myblue!70!black,line width=0.5pt](0,0)rectangle(0.32cm,0.17cm);~Ours (Diffusion) & \tikz[baseline=-1pt]\filldraw[fill=myblue!58!white,draw=myblue!80!black,line width=0.5pt](0,0)rectangle(0.32cm,0.17cm);~ResShift (Diffusion) & \tikz[baseline=-1pt]\filldraw[fill=myblue!28!white,draw=myblue!70!black,line width=0.5pt](0,0)rectangle(0.32cm,0.17cm);~SD-v1.5 (Diffusion) \\[2pt]
    \tikz[baseline=-1pt]\filldraw[fill=myred,draw=myred!70!black,line width=0.5pt](0,0)rectangle(0.32cm,0.17cm);~MDA-Net (GAN) & \tikz[baseline=-1pt]\filldraw[fill=mygreen,draw=mygreen!70!black,line width=0.5pt](0,0)rectangle(0.32cm,0.17cm);~GFE-Net (Trans.) \\
  \end{tabular}%
};

\node[anchor=north, font=\scriptsize, text=black!60,
      text width=14cm, align=center] at
    ($(current bounding box.south)+(0,-1.45cm)$)
    {All pairwise comparisons vs.\ \textbf{Ours}:
     $p<0.001$ ($^{***}$, Wilcoxon signed-rank test).};
